rows.description: Fest. Nats. { Stipend pro Augm. RED. de Newton & Merton
rows.notes: Description combines gemini-flash's accurate initial phrase ('Fest. Nats. {') and names ('RED.', 'Merton'). Amounts of 19 pounds and 13 shillings are clear. Pence value combines gemini-flash's '4' with gpt-5-mini's noted '1/2' fraction, which is visible as a small flourish after the '4'. gpt-5-mini's note regarding ambiguity was superior.
